dto.creator: tyogarajah
dto.testProcedure:
• Setup Neonatal Environment with ASL as shown in chapter 2.2
• Select Patient Group Neonatal and set patient weight to 2.0 kg.
• Connect O2 to instrument.
• Set the PinO2 to 4.5 bar
• Set the ASL to values in Table 23 ASL Settings. All other settings should use the default values set by the ASL – initial settings.

Parameter: Setting
Initial settings: neonate_normal
Rate: 60 b/min
Compliance: 4 ml/mbar
Resistance: 50 mbar/(l/s)
dto.testRequirements:
Parameter Group Min Factory setting Max Unit Format Accuracy Resolution
Oxygen Adult/Ped 21 50 100 % XX, XXX ± (volume fraction of 2,5% + 2,5% gas level) 1
Neo 50

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Hinweis:
Während des Parameterchecks und der Kalibration dürfen keine Schläuche am Fluke VT900A montiert sein. 

Achtung:
Der Fluke VT900A darf nur mit einem Filter betrieben werden (PN 279988), welcher sich am Inspirationseingange befindet.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........(General) Fluke VT900A - Parametercheck and calibration
Digit Number Validation Control Setting Oxygen

dto.title: PPLS.0024 Verification Controls Neo Oxygen
